title: Handle geometry build errors gracefully
analysis:
In Engine::build() (lib.rs lines 569-629), when ALL geometry operations fail — either because kernel.execute() returns Err or compile_geometry_op() returns None — the code accumulates per-operation error diagnostics but last_handle remains None. It then falls through to line 608: `let export_handle = last_handle.unwrap_or(GeometryHandleId(0))` and attempts to export a handle that was never created. With a mock kernel (which ignores handle validity), this silently produces bogus geometry_output=Some(data). With a real kernel, export fails and adds an 'export error' diagnostic, but there's no summary message indicating that geometry construction failed entirely.

The fix: after the geometry operation loop, check if `last_handle.is_none()` AND there were geometry operations to process (`total_ops > 0`). If so, skip the export, push a clear summary diagnostic ('all geometry operations failed; no geometry output produced'), and return geometry_output=None.

This preserves existing behavior for: (a) modules with no realizations/operations (total_ops == 0, current export-with-handle-0 behavior unchanged), (b) partial failures where at least one op succeeded (last_handle is Some, export proceeds normally).

prerequisites.description: Create test file crates/reify-eval/tests/geometry_error_handling.rs with a FailingMockGeometryKernel (execute always returns Err, export/query/tessellate return Ok with dummy data) and a helper function that builds a CompiledModule with one box primitive realization using TopologyTemplateBuilder. The failing mock's export intentionally succeeds to demonstrate the current bug: build() silently produces bogus geometry output when all operations fail.

steps.description: Write failing test `build_returns_no_geometry_when_all_kernel_ops_fail`: builds module with one box realization using FailingMockGeometryKernel, asserts geometry_output.is_none() AND diagnostics contain a message matching 'all geometry operations failed'. Currently fails because (1) export succeeds with bogus handle 0 so geometry_output is Some, and (2) no summary diagnostic exists.

Fix Engine::build() in lib.rs: before the export block (line 607), count total geometry ops across all templates/realizations. After the op loop, if last_handle.is_none() && total_ops > 0, push Diagnostic::error('all geometry operations failed; no geometry output produced') and set geometry_output to None (skip export entirely). Wrap the existing export logic in an else branch.

Write test `build_returns_no_geometry_when_all_ops_fail_to_compile`: builds module with only a boolean union op referencing GeomRef::Step(0) and Step(1) but no prior primitives, so compile_geometry_op returns None for all ops. Uses standard MockGeometryKernel (kernel.execute never called). Asserts geometry_output.is_none(), diagnostics contain 'failed to compile geometry operation' AND 'all geometry operations failed'. Verifies the compile-failure path also triggers the summary error.
Should pass from step-2 fix since both kernel-failure and compile-failure paths leave last_handle=None with total_ops>0. Verify and adjust if needed.

Write test `build_no_export_error_when_all_ops_fail`: uses FailingMockGeometryKernel whose export returns Err, builds module with box realization. Asserts that diagnostics do NOT contain any 'export error' message — proving export was never attempted. This tests a different failing mock (export fails) and confirms the fix skips export entirely rather than attempting it with a bogus handle.
Should pass from step-2 fix since export is skipped when all ops fail. Verify and adjust if needed.

Write regression test `build_with_no_realizations_still_exports`: uses bracket_compiled_module() (which has no realizations) with MockGeometryKernel. Asserts geometry_output.is_some() — same as existing boundary5_engine::build_with_mock_kernel test but in the new file, confirming the fix didn't regress the no-ops path. (total_ops=0 so the new check doesn't trigger.)
Should pass without changes since total_ops=0 for modules with no realizations. Verify and adjust if needed.

design_decisions.decision: Define FailingMockGeometryKernel inline in the test file rather than adding to reify-test-support
design_decisions.rationale: Keeps the change scoped to crates/reify-eval. The failing mock is simple (execute returns Err, other methods return Ok) and unlikely to be needed across multiple crates. If reuse is needed later, it can be promoted.

design_decisions.decision: Check total_ops > 0 to distinguish 'all ops failed' from 'no ops existed'
design_decisions.rationale: Counting operations is simpler and more reliable than checking diagnostics for geometry-related errors. It correctly handles the case where bracket_compiled_module (no realizations) still uses export with GeometryHandleId(0) — preserving that existing behavior unchanged.

design_decisions.decision: Add a summary Diagnostic::error rather than changing BuildResult's type or build()'s return type
design_decisions.rationale: Minimizes API surface change. BuildResult already has geometry_output: Option<Vec<u8>> and diagnostics: Vec<Diagnostic>. Callers (reify-cli/main.rs, e2e tests) already iterate diagnostics and check geometry_output. Adding a summary diagnostic integrates naturally with existing error reporting without requiring callers to handle a new Result variant.

design_decisions.decision: Skip export entirely when all ops fail rather than attempting export with GeometryHandleId(0)
design_decisions.rationale: Attempting export with a never-created handle is a logic error. With a mock it silently produces bogus data; with a real kernel it produces a confusing 'export error' for handle 0 that obscures the real problem (all geometry ops failed). Skipping export produces a clean error chain: per-op diagnostics + one summary diagnostic.

reuse.how: Build test CompiledModules with geometry realizations containing CompiledGeometryOp::Primitive and Boolean operations
Satisfy the constraint_checker parameter of Engine::new() in tests (returns Satisfied for all constraints)
Used in regression test for the no-realizations case, and as reference for implementing FailingMockGeometryKernel
Create Scalar values for geometry op parameters and ValueCellIds for test fixture modules
Regression test fixture — module with no realizations, verifying existing no-ops export behavior is unchanged

reuse.what: CompiledGeometryOp, PrimitiveKind, BooleanOp, GeomRef from reify_compiler
reuse.how: Construct geometry operations for test realization declarations (box primitives, boolean unions)

reuse.what: GeometryKernel trait, GeometryError, ExportError, etc. from reify_types
reuse.how: Implement FailingMockGeometryKernel trait in the test file
Create the summary diagnostic in build() and filter/assert diagnostics by severity in tests
